commit.subject: LU-00000 tests: verify RHEL 7.6 patch with full test group
commit.message:
LU-00000 tests: verify RHEL 7.6 patch with full test group

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el7.6 ossdistro=el7.6 mdsdistro=el7.6 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testgroup=full

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el7.6 ossdistro=el7.6 mdsdistro=el7.6 \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testgroup=full

Change-Id: I1b90f78c757cf43c4d9ede3218574fd984657f11
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
